rationale: Both reviews share the decisive findings (vacuous IsUnipotent, k-only AlgPoints, dead True lemma, True-field classes); Review 2 correctly identifies the redundant `SemisimpleGroup.instReductiveGroup` instance that Review 1 misses, but then contradicts itself by also asking the author to add @[simp], missing API, and rename a definition it recommends removing, which would likely confuse the author and cancel out the net benefit.
